shortDescription: IRCC PGWP · After study · DLI completion · Open work permit

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current PGWP fee (CAD $255 approx) and length rules on canada.ca. PGWP is one-time only for most applicants.

alert.title: One-time PGWP eligibility
alert.body: PGWP can usually only be obtained once. Program length and DLI status determine permit duration—verify before promising 3-year PGWP.

about.label: Description
about.value: Open work permit allowing international graduates of eligible DLIs to work in Canada after completing program. Duration linked to program length.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Completed eligible program at DLI · Valid study permit · Graduation confirmation · Applied within 180 days of completion letter

about.label: Duration rules
about.value: Program 8 months–2 years: PGWP may match program length. 2+ years: up to 3 years. Verify current IRCC rules.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Work anywhere in Canada. PGWP time supports CEC pathway to PR via Express Entry.

eligibility.criterion: Passport valid through desired PGWP period

redFlagsBanner: If ineligible due to program length or part-time study, explore other work permit options—do not submit weak PGWP application.

redFlags.title: Applied after 180-day deadline
redFlags.fix: Apply within 180 days or restore status if eligible

redFlags.title: Program too short
redFlags.fix: Verify eligibility before completion; plan alternative

redFlags.title: Part-time study history
redFlags.description: Did not maintain required full-time status.
redFlags.fix: Document exceptional circumstances if any; verify eligibility

redFlags.title: Non-eligible DLI or program
redFlags.fix: Verify on IRCC DLI list before enrolment—not at PGWP stage

redFlags.title: Missing completion letter
redFlags.description: Applied with transcript only without official completion.
redFlags.fix: Obtain official completion letter from registrar

redFlags.title: Passport expires before PGWP length
redFlags.fix: Renew passport before applying for full PGWP length

faqs.a: No. IRCC verifies eligibility. Most eligible graduates are approved but we never guarantee.
Depends on program length—8 months minimum program for any PGWP; up to 3 years for 2+ year programs.
Generally must apply within 180 days while eligible—rules vary if outside Canada. Verify current instructions.
If applied before study permit expiry, may work under implied status—verify current rules.
Canadian work experience on PGWP counts toward CEC—key PR pathway.
Generally one PGWP per lifetime—exceptions rare.
Spouse may qualify for open work permit if PGWP holder meets skill level—verify current rules.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Confirm PGWP eligibility at enrolment stage not just graduation
Apply within 180 days of completion letter
Obtain official completion letter from DLI
Track implied status work rules if applying near permit expiry
postApproval: Send PGWP approval and expiry date
Guide on SIN and tax registration

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: 180-day deadline from completion letter—not convocation date. Counsel at graduation immediately.

quiz.question: Minimum program length for any PGWP:

dos: Ensure passport validity covers PGWP period
donts: Do not apply without completion letter
Do not promise 3-year PGWP without verifying program length
Do not ignore part-time study issues
mistakes: Applied on convocation day but letter dated months earlier
Second PGWP attempt after prior PGWP

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample completion / graduation letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Confirms program completion date for PGWP / 485 / Graduate Route.

sampleDocs.title: Sample final transcript (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Official transcript with degree conferred date.

sampleDocs.title: Sample study permit / visa copy (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Prior student visa evidence required for post-study pathways.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.
